headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Kimberly-Clark, Raises Price Target to $121
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Michael Lavery   maintains Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $115 to $121.
